'''''Challenge'' 32''' was a roleplaying game magazine that was published in [[1988]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, and included an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called ''[[Alone Against the Empire]]'' and was written by [[Lester W. Smith]].
